title: Ossaea leptopus

This family comprises over 13,000 species across more than 600 genera. As a member of the Rubiaceae family, Ossaea leptopus is further classified within the order Gentianales. The order Gentianales includes several other families, such as Apocynaceae and Loganiaceae, that share similar characteristics with Rubiaceae.
